plan_metadata.name: Tab Local Debug Env Local Creation

steps.description: Click on the "Declarative Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu to create an agent using instructions and actions.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option within the dropdown menu titled "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" at coordinates (474, 210).
Click on the dropdown option "Tab" under the "Teams Capability" menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select or specify the project directory.
Click the "env" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to expand its contents.

Perform a right-click on the ".env.local" file within the "env" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code. The interaction point is marked precisely at the file name, highlighted by a red crosshair.
Click the "Delete" option in the context menu for the selected file ".env.local" in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Close" (X) button at the top-right corner of the Google Chrome browser window to close the Teams app tab.
Click the "Run and Debug" icon in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface to open debugging options. The interaction point is visually highlighted with a red crosshair on the icon.
